repo_notes.content: Cyanide is a medium-interaction SSH and Telnet framework. The core logic is located in the src/cyanide/ directory. Documentation is organized in the docs/ folder, covering developer references, user guides, and translations.
repo_notes.author: tanhiowyatt

pages.title: Architecture Overview
pages.purpose: Overview of the framework architecture, session flow, and component interaction.

pages.title: Developer Reference
pages.purpose: Detailed documentation for developers on core services, emulators, and ML engine.

pages.title: User Reference
pages.purpose: Guides for installation, configuration, and advanced usage.
